creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Ahh, you are right! Somewhere between 1.8.1 and 1.8.2 modules were split up into separate Github repositories and I didn't notice because I had a local checkout. Please use this patch: it switches back to release distfiles and fixes module search path. During the early days of the port I switched from release distfiles to Github snapshots because the upstream was rerolling these without notice.
This hasn't been happening recently, so it should be safe t use again.

Please update this ASAP. The port is currently broken.
